description: Hand-curated wind-tunnel reference data for Modern (#3) validation. Each row is a single (airfoil, alpha, Re, Mach) -> (CL, CD, CM_c/4) measurement with citation. Schema v2 adds optional Xtr_U / Xtr_L (measured transition x/c) and cp_distribution (array of {x_over_c, Cp_upper, Cp_lower}) for B2/B4 Phase-3 Tier-B validation.
notes: Numbers are read from published curves and tables. Wind-tunnel uncertainty is documented per-source; for the NACA Langley smooth-airfoil tunnel tests it is typically +/-0.0005-0.001 in CD at low CL, larger near stall.
All data is in the standard 2D, smooth, free-transition condition unless explicitly noted (e.g., 'standard_roughness').
Mach numbers are nominally 0 for the NACA 6-series tests (low-speed wind tunnel; M < 0.17 in practice).
When the source publishes a curve only, we read points off the curve and tag uncertainty appropriately.

Airfoil naming: naca####  -> generated via NacaAirfoilGenerator.Generate4DigitClassic. 5-digit and arbitrary airfoils need a .dat path (TODO: stage common reference geometries under tools/external-references/geometry/).

Schema v2 additions: 'Xtr_U' / 'Xtr_L' are measured/estimated transition x/c on upper/lower surface (B2 DAMPL2). For laminar separation bubbles these are typically taken as the turbulent reattachment point from oil-flow visualization. 'cp_distribution' is an array of {x_over_c, Cp_upper, Cp_lower} records for B4 Karman-Tsien validation. Both fields are optional.
